subcodes.first_line: Should one gaze upon the state of this servant of Truth, then verily in the pathway of God the depths of the pit are as the moon's zenith, and prison is a palace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگر نظر بحالت اين بنده حقّ گردد در سبيل الهی قعر چاه اوج ماه است زندان ايوان است
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @nearness to God
